Rules
  • Do not personal attack other players
  • Do not post during night.
  • Do not quote or pretend to quote anything I say in a PM, especially role PMs. This includes screenshots of a role PM, or claiming any flavor.
  • Do not use any formatting that conceals text or appears to conceal text.
  • Ask me for any rule clarifications or questions about the game in your Role PM, and only in your role PM. Do not refer to any mod communication in thread, and any necessary clarifications will be answered in thread. Any questions asked in thread will not be answered, even in bold.
  • Do not edit or delete any posts.
  • Don't gamethrow. This includes self-voting in a serious manner
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this game thread.


Voting
  • Vote in the form Vote: Username.
  • Vote for a no lynch in the form Vote: No Lynch.
  • Unvote is used for unvoting
  • At the end of each day, the players with the most amount of votes is lynched. Ties are broken randomly. Starting day 2, if at any point a player has more than half the votes, that player will be lynched.
  • Votes are locked in LyLo.


Activity/Day/Night
  • Day will last for 14 days.
  • Night will last for 3 days.
  • Whether you post enough for a day phase is up to the mod. You know you are doing something wrong if the only things you post are activity posts. Just actually play the game and you should be fine.

post_rendered:
https://www.mafiauniverse.com/forums/content/4-2-Seers-Cops-and-Keeping-Good-Cover-(by-Yates)?page=4

ok so the gist of cop cover is we want to know who the cop peeked if they die

basically you say "Copcheck: [player x]" or something like that and we will assume you have an inno on that person if you're a cop (I'm not exactly sure what to do if the real cop has a guilty so hopefully one of the more experienced players can explain that)

The reason for everyone doing this is that if only the cop did then scum would find the cop easy, eh?

Now the reason I'm not copchecking right away is because if we fake cop check a mafia, then they know we're not cops and that limits their choices to NK when hunting for the cop. So, there's a few things we can do to help prevent this:
1) Wait to do cop checks until later in the day - this way you can develop your reads a bit more on drop a cop check on someone who you think is likely to be town rather than just a random anywhobody
2) Spread out your cop checks. In 154 most of the town dropped n0 cop checks on the same player who turned out to be a mafia so the mafia already had a PoE of 2 people when looking for the cop. To avoid this, we should spread out our cop checks as much as possible while still preserving their integrity. Obviously dropping a cop check on someone who you've been reading as a mafia will signal to the mafia that you are not an actual cop. But as much as is possible lets try to spread our cop checks.

Another thing to remember is that once you commit to a fake peek, you are committed to this peak. You cannot back down from it otherwise the mafia will easily figure out you're not cop.

I suggest we reveal copchecks around 4 days from deadline

https://www.mafiauniverse.com/forums/content/4-2-Seers-Cops-and-Keeping-Good-Cover-(by-Yates)?page=4

ok so the gist of cop cover is we want to know who the cop peeked if they die

basically you say "Copcheck: [player x]" or something like that and we will assume you have an inno on that person if you're a cop (I'm not exactly sure what to do if the real cop has a guilty so hopefully one of the more experienced players can explain that)

The reason for everyone doing this is that if only the cop did then scum would find the cop easy, eh?

Now the reason I'm not copchecking right away is because if we fake cop check a mafia, then they know we're not cops and that limits their choices to NK when hunting for the cop. So, there's a few things we can do to help prevent this:
1) Wait to do cop checks until later in the day - this way you can develop your reads a bit more on drop a cop check on someone who you think is likely to be town rather than just a random anywhobody
2) Spread out your cop checks. In 154 most of the town dropped n0 cop checks on the same player who turned out to be a mafia so the mafia already had a PoE of 2 people when looking for the cop. To avoid this, we should spread out our cop checks as much as possible [b]while still preserving their integrity[/b]. Obviously dropping a cop check on someone who you've been reading as a mafia will signal to the mafia that you are not an actual cop. But as much as is possible lets try to spread our cop checks.

Another thing to remember is that once you commit to a fake peek, [b]you are committed to this peak[/b]. You cannot back down from it otherwise the mafia will easily figure out you're not cop.

I suggest we reveal copchecks around 4 days from deadline

bigmath wrote:
Because we don’t have a doc to protect the cop so what is the point of cop checking if the cop is gonna get NKed from the mafia
The idea is that scum needs to kill the cop ASAP. If the cop is killed, their reads might be hard to figure out. Therefore, the cop wants to make their copchecks obvious. However, with this, the cop will be exposed immediately. So, it is up to the vanilla townies to protect the cop by providing fake cop checks. Optimally you want to give a fake cop check to someone you want to townread but don't want to explain the townread to (and if you're cop, you always always always give your actual cop check)

Personally I tend to not give away actual copchecks but rather make them as obvious as possible in my reads. Though, it's not something I'd recommend for most players.

These articles (the latter has some stuff not related to this, because it refers to a certain phase length, but a good part of it is very useful) are quite helpful for understanding the setup.
